ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tickets" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Descriptive summary of the ticket */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the ticket (e.g., new, in progress, resolved) */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Relevant keywords for the ticket */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner assigned to the ticket */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ticket type */,
  "priority_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ticket priority */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the ticket was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the ticket was last updated */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Expected date by which the ticket should be resolved */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the ticket */,
  "reported_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reported the ticket */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the ticket was resolved */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Any additional comments or notes related to the ticket */,
  "parent_ticket_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent ticket, if this ticket is a sub-task */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_reported_by FOREIGN KEY ("reported_by") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES ticket_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_priority_id FOREIGN KEY ("priority_id") REFERENCES priorities ("priority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Full name of the owner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the owner */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the owner */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the owner (e.g., Developer, QA, Manager) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the owner belongs to */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the owner was added to the system */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the owner's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the team was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the team's information was last updated */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team manager */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the team is working on */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticket_teams" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ticket */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date when the team was assigned to the ticket */,
  "unassigned_date" TEXT /* Date when the team was unassigned from the ticket (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id", "team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticket_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the ticket type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ticket type */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the ticket type was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the ticket type's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "priorities" (
  "priority_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each priority */,
  "priority_name" TEXT /* Name of the priority */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the priority */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the priority was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the priority's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("priority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticket_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ticket */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., status update, assignment) */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the change made */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the history entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_history_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the project was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the project's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ticket the comment is related to */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id")
)
